moments.title: World Cup 2026 in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted by Canada, Mexico, and the United States, is well underway, with group stage matches dominating screens.

angles.name: World Cup buzz
angles.copy: Anyone else glued to the World Cup? The group stages are delivering some absolute crackers this year. Who's impressed you most so far?

angles.name: Surprise team
angles.copy: That World Cup feeling is definitely in the air! What's your top pick for a surprise team to watch make a deep run?

moments.title: Glastonbury Kicks Off!
moments.blurb: The iconic Glastonbury Festival opens its gates this Wednesday for five days of music, arts, and culture at Worthy Farm.

angles.name: Glastonbury countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is officially ON! Glastonbury Festival opens its gates on Wednesday. Who's heading to Worthy Farm, and who are you most buzzing to see?

angles.name: Glasto memories
angles.copy: Glastonbury week! Even if you're not there, the buzz is undeniable. What's your favourite Glasto memory or performance of all time?

moments.title: Wimbledon Grand Slam Next Week
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships begin next Monday, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London.

angles.name: Wimbledon predictions
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon starts next Monday. Who are you backing for the singles titles this year?

angles.name: Wimbledon vibe
angles.copy: That familiar Wimbledon anticipation is building! What's your favourite thing about the Championships – the tennis, the fashion, or just the whole vibe?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cyndi Lauper!
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'True Colors', celebrates her 73rd birthday today.

angles.name: Cyndi's best song
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still rocking those incredible vocals. What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Cyndi's legacy
angles.copy: Today, we're celebrating Cyndi Lauper's 73rd! From 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' to Broadway, she's done it all. An absolute legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Fleetwood!
moments.blurb: Fleetwood Mac co-founder and legendary drummer Mick Fleetwood turns 79 this Wednesday.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac track
angles.copy: Wishing a massive Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Mick Fleetwood this Wednesday! The heartbeat of Fleetwood Mac. What's your go-to Mac track?

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac album
angles.copy: Mick Fleetwood turns 79 on Wednesday! An absolute drumming icon. What's your favourite Fleetwood Mac album?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ariana Grande!
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday this Friday.

angles.name: Ariana's top track
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande this Friday! From Broadway to global pop domination. What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Ariana's best era
angles.copy: Celebrating Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday on Friday! Her voice is just phenomenal. What's your favourite Ariana era?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott!
moments.blurb: Trailblazing rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday next Wednesday.

angles.name: Missy's favourite track
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott next Wednesday. A true innovator in music. What's your favourite Missy track?

angles.name: Missy's impact
angles.copy: Celebrating the iconic Missy Elliott's 55th birthday on July 1st! Her videos, her beats, her flow – unparalleled. What's your favourite Missy video?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Harry!
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman Debbie Harry, a true punk and new wave legend, celebrates her 81st birthday next Wednesday.

angles.name: Blondie's best song
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry from Blondie next Wednesday! An absolute legend. What's your favourite Blondie song?

angles.name: Blondie's best album
angles.copy: Debbie Harry turns 81 on July 1st! Still effortlessly cool. What's your favourite Blondie album?

moments.title: Summer's Officially Here!
moments.blurb: With the Summer Solstice just passed, the UK is fully embracing the summer season, bringing longer days and warmer weather.

angles.name: Summer plans
angles.copy: Summer is officially ON! What are your plans for soaking up the longer days and (hopefully) sunshine this week?

angles.name: Summer anthem
angles.copy: That summer feeling is definitely here! What's your go-to summer anthem right now?

moments.title: Who's No.1 on the UK Chart?
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart was unveiled last Friday, with Sabrina Carpenter - Espresso holding strong at the top.

angles.name: Chart update
angles.copy: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is in! Sabrina Carpenter - Espresso is still riding high. What's your favourite track in the Top 10 right now?

angles.name: Chart surprises
angles.copy: Did you check the new UK Top 40 on Friday? Any surprises, or is your favourite still climbing?

moments.title: Gŵyl Ifan Celebrations in Wales
moments.blurb: Traditional Welsh folk festival Gŵyl Ifan, celebrating St John's Day, is being marked across Wales with dance, music, and cultural events.

angles.name: Gŵyl Ifan festivities
angles.copy: Happy Gŵyl Ifan! Celebrating Welsh culture and traditions across the nation this week. What's your favourite part of the festivities?

angles.name: St John's Day Wales
angles.copy: From folk dancing to traditional music, Gŵyl Ifan is here! How are you celebrating St John's Day in Wales?

moments.title: Oceanfest Wraps Up in Croyde
moments.blurb: The GoldCoast Oceanfest, combining surf, music, and beach life, concludes today in Croyde, North Devon, after a weekend of action.

angles.name: Oceanfest highlights
angles.copy: What a weekend at GoldCoast Oceanfest! If you were there, what was your highlight from the surf, music, and beach vibes in Croyde?

angles.name: Oceanfest memories
angles.copy: Oceanfest 2026 wraps up today! Hope everyone who headed to Croyde had an amazing time. Already looking forward to next year?
